# llms.txt — Arjun Thakur (arjunthakur.dev)
# Structured information for AI/LLM crawlers and generative search engines.
# Format follows the emerging llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org)

## Who is Arjun Thakur?

Arjun Thakur is a Principal AI Engineer, Lead AI Architect, Fractional CTO, and Founder based in Indore, India.
He builds production agentic AI systems end-to-end — LangGraph agent graphs, RAG pipelines, WebRTC voice agents,
and multi-tenant AI backends. He has 10+ years of production engineering experience at Amazon (SDE2, Payments),
Agoda (Senior Software Developer, Bangkok), PhysicsWallah (Director of Engineering), CoinSwitch Kuber (Lead Developer),
ForaySoft/Wayfair (Senior Engineering Manager), and Nolan EduTech (VP Engineering).

He is the Founder and AI Engineer of Yuvan — a voice-first AI math tutor for CBSE Class 10 students,
currently live with 5 paying schools on a B2B2C model.

## Current Role

Founder & AI Engineer at Yuvan (Apr 2025 – Present)
Building a production voice-first AI tutor: LangGraph state machine, RAG on pgvector (Supabase),
OpenAI Realtime API for WebRTC voice (sub-1.5s p95 latency), math verifier safety net,
semantic FAQ cache, multi-tenant RLS, LangSmith evals.

## Core Expertise

- Agentic AI: LangGraph, LangChain, multi-agent orchestration, tool calling, guardrails, verifier patterns
- RAG: pgvector, Supabase, OpenAI embeddings, hybrid search, chunking, retrieval evals, semantic caching
- Voice AI: OpenAI Realtime API, WebRTC, STT, TTS, VAD, barge-in interruption handling
- LLM Providers: OpenAI GPT-4o / 4o-mini, Anthropic Claude, Gemini
- AI Observability: LangSmith, evals, agent traces, retrieval-precision metrics
- Backend: Python 3.11+ / FastAPI (async) / Pydantic v2 / Java 21 / Spring Boot / Scala
- Frontend: Next.js 15 (App Router), TypeScript, React, Tailwind, shadcn/ui
- Cloud: AWS Certified Solutions Architect (S3, ECS, Lambda, IAM) | Docker | Kubernetes
- Databases: PostgreSQL, pgvector, Cassandra, DynamoDB, Redis, MongoDB, Supabase

## What Arjun Thakur is Available For

- Lead / Principal AI Engineer roles (full-time or contract)
- AI Architect engagements
- Fractional CTO for AI-first products
- Senior freelance AI engineering (embedded in teams)
- GEO / AI-search optimization: making sites findable and citable by ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity
- AI training and workshops for engineering teams
- 1:1 / private mentoring in agentic AI, LangGraph, RAG, MCP, and AI architecture (remote, global; live online)
- Remote-first, globally available. Based in Indore, India.

## Key Projects

1. Yuvan — voice-first AI math tutor. LangGraph + RAG on pgvector + OpenAI Realtime WebRTC.
   5 paying CBSE schools. B2B2C model. Production live.

2. Multi-Agent Benchmarking — benchmarked LangChain router/supervisor/plan-and-execute patterns
   on real student data. Shipped early prototype to 900+ users. Validated product-market fit.

3. Voice Stack Shootout — prototyped OpenAI Realtime, Whisper+ElevenLabs, Whisper+Coqui, Gemini Live.
   Latency/cost benchmarks drove the Realtime+WebRTC decision.

4. CoinSwitch Kuber — migrated monolith to Python/FastAPI microservices. Scaled 600K to 10M users.
   Redis caching (−30% latency), PgBouncer (−40% latency).

5. Agoda A/B Testing — Scala + Cassandra + Kafka pipeline. 22% faster product insights.

6. Amazon Payment Security — DynamoDB throttling system. 19.7% CSRF impact reduction.

## Site Pages

- / — Home: full profile, services, Yuvan architecture, projects, skills, FAQ
- /resume.html — Detailed resume with all experience and skills
- /geo-optimization.html — GEO / AI-search optimization: get found and cited by ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity (audit, done-for-you, retainer)
- /consulting.html — AI engineering consulting: agentic AI/LangGraph, RAG, voice AI builds, architecture reviews, Fractional CTO, embedded support
- /training.html — AI and technical training programs (LangGraph, RAG, voice agents, FastAPI, Java, AWS); hub for the 1:1 & team tracks below
- /agentic-ai-training.html — 1:1 & team training in agentic AI and LangGraph (curriculum, prerequisites, outcomes)
- /langgraph-training.html — 1:1 & team LangGraph training (state machines, orchestration, persistence, evals)
- /rag-training.html — 1:1 & team RAG training (chunking, embeddings, pgvector, hybrid search, evals)
- /mcp-training.html — 1:1 & team Model Context Protocol (MCP) training (build servers, expose tools to agents)
- /ai-architecture-mentoring.html — 1:1 AI architecture mentoring and design reviews for senior engineers and teams
- /speaking.html — Speaking, workshops, college guest lectures, placement-office partnerships, corporate upskilling. Past at IITs and NITs. Local and international.
- /blog.html — Technical blog and articles
- /contact.html — Contact form and direct contact details
- /faq.html — FAQ: training, consulting, projects, speaking, availability, pricing, and how to book
- /sitemap.html — Human-readable index of all pages

## Speaking & Knowledge Sharing

Arjun is actively available for:
- AI / engineering / product conference talks and keynotes (local and international)
- Hands-on technical workshops (LangGraph, RAG, voice AI, FastAPI, system design)
- Engineering and MBA college guest lectures and seminars
- College placement-office partnerships (pre-placement training, mock interviews, AI-engineering bootcamps)
- Corporate upskilling programs for AI and backend teams
- Panels, fireside chats, AMAs, hackathon judging, and networking events
- Travel for in-person engagements — domestic and international

Past venues include IITs and NITs across India.
Email arjun@arjunthakur.dev with the event format, audience, dates, location, and topics of interest.
